header.title: About
heading: Trusted Sri Lanka Tour Company
intro.p1: Ceylon JOJO Travels Sri Lanka is a trusted local tour company offering private Sri Lanka tours, tailor-made holiday packages, and chauffeur driven round tours across the island.
intro.p2: Explore the best of Sri Lanka including Sigiriya, Kandy, Ella, Nuwara Eliya, Galle, and Yala National Park. We provide comfortable vehicles, friendly chauffeur guides, and personalized travel experiences for families, couples, and honeymoon travelers.
intro.p3: Plan your perfect Sri Lanka holiday with a reliable local tour operator and enjoy safe, comfortable, and unforgettable travel experiences.
img.alt1: Private Sri Lanka Tour with Ceylon JOJO Travels
img.alt2: Sri Lanka Tour Packages with Chauffeur Guide
features.pricing.title: Affordable Sri Lanka Tour Packages
features.pricing.desc: We provide affordable private Sri Lanka tours, tailor-made holiday packages, and chauffeur-driven tours designed to fit every budget without compromising comfort, safety, and quality travel experiences.
features.service.title: Professional Chauffeur Guides & Personalized Service
features.service.desc: Our experienced chauffeur guides and travel experts ensure a safe, comfortable, and personalized Sri Lanka travel experience, covering top destinations like Sigiriya, Kandy, Ella, Yala, and Galle.
features.experts.title: Trusted Sri Lanka Travel Experts
features.experts.desc: As a trusted local Sri Lanka tour operator, we welcome travelers worldwide and offer unforgettable experiences including cultural tours, wildlife safaris, beach holidays, and luxury private round tours across Sri Lanka.
